prompt_descriptor.bounded_prompt_summary: Bounded descriptor summary for provider-runtime-request-claim-001; no executable prompt is sent.

requests.bounded_purpose: Shape a claim candidate from caller-provided bounded preview data.

prompt_descriptor.bounded_prompt_summary: Bounded descriptor summary for provider-runtime-request-summary-001; no executable prompt is sent.

requests.bounded_purpose: Shape a source summary candidate from caller-provided bounded preview data.
boundary_notes: candidate preview is caller-provided bounded input, not provider output.

prompt_descriptor.bounded_prompt_summary: Bounded descriptor summary for provider-runtime-request-gap-001; no executable prompt is sent.

requests.bounded_purpose: Shape a knowledge gap signal from caller-provided bounded preview data.

prompt_descriptor.bounded_prompt_summary: Bounded descriptor summary for provider-runtime-request-review-001; no executable prompt is sent.

requests.bounded_purpose: Keep calibration signal candidate request in operator review without preview data.

prompt_descriptor.bounded_prompt_summary: Bounded descriptor summary for provider-runtime-request-raw-blocked-001; no executable prompt is sent.

requests.bounded_purpose: Block raw private payload before any candidate output can be shaped.
boundary_notes: raw private payload blocked by runtime fixture

prompt_descriptor.bounded_prompt_summary: Bounded descriptor summary for provider-runtime-request-secret-blocked-001; no executable prompt is sent.

requests.bounded_purpose: Block secret-like placeholder input before any candidate output can be shaped.
boundary_notes: secret-like provider input blocked by runtime fixture

prompt_descriptor.bounded_prompt_summary: Bounded descriptor summary for provider-runtime-request-missing-source-001; no executable prompt is sent.

requests.bounded_purpose: Block candidate shaping when bounded source lineage is missing.
boundary_notes: Missing bounded source lineage blocks future provider use.

prompt_descriptor.bounded_prompt_summary: Bounded descriptor summary for provider-runtime-request-unsupported-target-001; no executable prompt is sent.

requests.bounded_purpose: Block unsupported target kind before candidate output shaping.

prompt_descriptor.bounded_prompt_summary: Bounded descriptor summary for provider-runtime-request-rejected-001; no executable prompt is sent.

requests.bounded_purpose: Keep rejected candidate request from producing runtime candidate output.
boundary_notes: Rejected candidate requests do not produce runtime outputs.

prompt_descriptor.bounded_prompt_summary: Bounded descriptor summary for provider-runtime-request-accepted-without-preview-001; no executable prompt is sent.

requests.bounded_purpose: Keep accepted request candidate-only when no caller-provided preview exists.

candidate_previews.bounded_output_summary: Public-safe claim candidate preview supplied by caller for runtime shaping.
Public-safe source summary candidate preview supplied by caller.
Public-safe knowledge gap signal preview supplied by caller.

candidate_outputs.bounded_output_summary: Public-safe claim candidate preview supplied by caller for runtime shaping.
Public-safe knowledge gap signal preview supplied by caller.
Public-safe source summary candidate preview supplied by caller.

boundary_notes: It processes caller-provided candidate previews and bounded inputs only.
